about_item: Vapur Collapsible and Flexible Water Bottle with Detachable Carabiner: Our anti-bottle stands when full and folds small when empty. Stores easily in pocket, purse, or backpack for portable hydration
Spill-Proof Convenience: Vapur's collapsible water bottle cap has a tough seal with rubber stopper for a leak proof closure and a flip open spout for quick and easy hydrating
Lightweight Wide Mouth Design: Our collapsible water bottle is designed with a wide mouth opening making it easy to fill and is lightweight weighing under 2 ounces when empty
Easy to Clean, BPA-Free Bottle: Vapur's anti-bottle is easy to clean, dishwasher safe and made with sustainable BPA-Free food grade material to be reused for years
Explore the Full Range of Vapur Products: Vapur offers a variety of collapsible water bottles, flasks, and wine carriers as well as the EZ Lick line, designed specifically for dogs

features.title: Foldable
features.text: The portable Anti-Bottle can be easily tucked away, weighing just 2 ounces when empty!

features.title: Dishwasher Safe
features.text: The Vapur Anti-Bottle is top rack dishwasher safe. Remove the cap and carabiner, blow air into the bottle to inflate and insert the spout over the prongs. Or, hand wash with a bottle brush.

features.title: Freezable
features.text: To make cold water convenient and easily portable, Vapur Anti-Bottles are designed to freeze. Stick your Anti-Bottle in the freezer overnight and when you take it out, you'll have refreshing cold water for hours.

summary.text: Customers appreciate the water bottle's portability, as it folds up small when empty and is perfect for travel. They find it convenient, lightweight, and functional, with one customer noting it's particularly useful for motorcycle riders. The bottle's size receives positive feedback, as it decreases in size as water is consumed. While some customers report it doesn't leak, others mention leakage issues. Durability is mixed, with some saying it holds up well while others report it breaking after three days of use.

authors_reviews.title: Awesome light compactable water bottle option! Held up well on trip!
authors_reviews.text: Love these! We used these a while ago for a trip to Universal. They worked so well since they can fold up when it isn’t in use and are not heavy even when filled with water. We decided to take Fanny packs only since you can wear them on most of the rides without having to use a locker like you would for normal backpack. Because of that we decided to look for foldable water bottles and found these. This was so easy to use, just clipped it to my Fanny pack and it worked great both empty/ folded as well as full of water. Was great compact option which gave us the ability to have water without bringing a larger heavy water bottle. It obviously does not keep stuff cold like a heavier metal one would (as these are plastic) but still enjoyed the convenience of being able to put it away easily. 4 of us each had one and used them over multiple days and they held up well with no leaks or tears. Was worried they may be hard to clean but was easy. (I added a small rubber band to mine, which you can see in the picture, so I could keep it closed easier when I was using the clip)
authors_reviews.author: biggscpa

authors_reviews.title: A compact, light-weight alternative to traditional bottles.
authors_reviews.text: Compact when not in use, stable stand when liquid-filled. A variety of colors to choose from to match whatever your personal sensibilities are. I'm using the anti-bottle for water only and the material doesn't seem to affect the taste of the water. Easy to refill and easy to drink from. I much prefer this for portability over the metal/hard plastic options most people utilize.
authors_reviews.author: Hans

authors_reviews.title: Finally Started Leaking After 15 Months
authors_reviews.text: For reference, I bought the 1.0L Olive Green Vapur Eclipse Anti Bottle in November of 2013. Unfortunately, as of February 2015, I need a new one (approximately a 15-16 month lifespan, naturally just outside the warranty). I loved this so much, but it kinda let me down in an unexpected way, so I figured I'd share. First off, some things other reviewers have stated that are 100% true and awesome, at least in my experience:- Mine never leaked at the cap or threads.- The snappy cap never wore out.- The carabiner never broke or wore out.- It stands up on it's own, no problem.- It rolls up and the carabiner secures it from unrolling - awesome to pack up.- You can freeze it (as long as you leave room for the ice to expand).So what happened to mine? From day one, mine developed some odd creasing at the top of the bottle, just below where the bottle material is sealed to the female threads. It didn't affect performance, but the finish did rub off since that creasing stuck out. As soon as I saw it, I figured that would be a problem. As of today, friction from being tossed around in various backpacks and bags has rubbed through the bottle material and I have sprung a small leak.I like it too much to not buy a new one. I can hold as much water as my Nalgene without the weight. It has been abused just like my Nalgene with no ill effects. The only time I have to pay attention to it is if I fill it up before a flight, as the air pressure (if there's air in it) may cause it to leak. Since I commute with a backpack, it will squish around books, pens, pencils, lunch items, etc. as opposed to a Nalgene that takes up the same amount of room full or empty, and stubbornly refuses to mold to the other items in the bag.For the avid hiker/walker/biker: If you're used to reaching around and grabbing a Nalgene out of a water bottle pocket and replacing it with ease, this bottle may frustrate you. It's just a bit too squishy to hold it's shape when being jammed into a water bottle pocket. Maybe my bags just have terrible pockets, but it's a small issue I've leaned to work around. Although to take that further, if your water bottle pockets are not deep or are flimsy, this might just flop right out when you're jostling it around. Since it's so easy to pack inside a bag and I don't have to worry about it leaking (until now), I just toss it inside.I'm not really sure how to feel about buying a new one right now. I wish it were guaranteed for longer, but then again, they are inexpensive enough to just purchase again new. I'm concerned that I may have the same problem again. Would I buy a third 15 months from now? I'm not sure yet. It's tough to beat the conveniences this gives you over a Nalgene. I don't really want stainless since I like to see how much water I've got, so there really aren't any better alternatives if you want the weight savings, ability to pack it down, and conform to the rest of your bag contents.Hope this review helped.
authors_reviews.author: Tom

authors_reviews.title: Best reusable water bottle
authors_reviews.text: **Update**Been using mine every time I leave the house, for work, school, or other, it's been 18 months and only now has it started to leak.I really liked this bottle, I rarely cleaned it, as I only used water, and it would get slightly musty smelling if I left it in the sun, but I honestly washed it maybe 6-7 times in 18 months!Also, I've stepped on this several times, by accident, and I only weigh about 110lb, but still!My stepping on it didn't cause the leak though, just noticed it around where the cap meets the plastic of the bag.wish I knew how to recycle it.-adult childBought one for each of us for Christmas. Adult children LOVE them and use each day. I use mine only when I want water (no ice or flavoring) and am out and about shopping, hiking, etc. I'd seen a co worker with one and she loved hers, highly recommended them.At work I want to add half ice to my water so I used a covered cup. The opening would also make it a little harder to refill using the water cooler dispensers. I'd have to put the opening right up around the flow valves from those machines and I am not confident with our cleaning crews attention to hygiene. (Somehow I think if there is more air space then my drink won't get contaminated--could just be me.) When shopping though, or WHEN I CAN'T FILL IT FROM HOME, then it's great--my go to bottle, use it 1-2x per week. Wonderful for air travel because you can just collapse it into your bag or pocket.My kids love it, use it at their work places, school, work. They fill them up, partially freeze, even use them at home instead of the endless barrage of cups. They like to use them at home because the house cat considers any open container an invitation for her to have a sip.I would have liked to purchase different colors. We put our initials on ours with a permanent marker. I thought I was ordering different colors, was amazed at the change in price. So, out of all of the reusable containers we have purchased and used over the years, this seems to be the best water container.
authors_reviews.author: Kindle Customer

other_countries_reviews.title: Excelente para viajar a europa
other_countries_reviews.text: Ideal para los aeropuertos y museos en Europa, solo me terminaba el agua y a la mochila
other_countries_reviews.author: Pepe pecas

other_countries_reviews.title: Práctico, cómodo y sin olores.
other_countries_reviews.text: De momento muy bien, porque el agua sabe a agua, no a plasticos. He leído opiniones que dicen que termina teniendo fugas, pero de momento va muy bien. Eso sí, me parece un poco cara (16,58€) Por lo demás, se bebe muy bien de ella, se mantiene de pie, aunque esto da igual porque como es estanca da igual que esté de pie o tumbada.
other_countries_reviews.author: José

other_countries_reviews.title: Pierde agua
other_countries_reviews.text: No lo recomiendo. En el primer uso vi que perdía agua por lo que es inservible

other_countries_reviews.title: Butelka przecieka po paru użyciach
other_countries_reviews.text: Fajna koncepcja ale nie wytrzymała kilku miesięcy użycia, zaczęła się rozklejac przy nakrętce i w konsekwencji przeciekac.
other_countries_reviews.author: Adrianna

other_countries_reviews.title: 使い勝手良い
other_countries_reviews.text: プラティパスを使っていたが、蓋が崖下に落ちて難儀したので蓋を外さないタイプを物色して購入。カラビナ部は、オマケかと思ったら、これが何気に便利だった。持ち運ぶ時や、落とさない様にザックに付けたりと重宝してる。ただ、まだ数回しか使ってないので耐久性は分からないです。
other_countries_reviews.author: フィッシュベッド
